description_long: This is a military-style SUV with a boxy, angular body and a camouflage paint scheme in green, brown, and black tones. The vehicle features four doors with visible hinges and handles, rugged off-road tires, and a reinforced front bumper with a grille guard. The windows are tinted and the roof is flat, with a long, thin radio antenna mounted at the rear left corner. The exterior shows signs of wear and dirt, especially on the wheels and lower panels, suggesting use in rough environments. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, optimized for durability and functionality rather than comfort or aesthetics.
description: A rugged, camouflage-painted SUV with four doors, off-road tires, and a reinforced front bumper, featuring a long rear antenna and a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the reinforced bumper, grille guard, and two headlights, with the windshield and antenna visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the four-door configuration, rugged tires, and the full length of the antenna at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the flat back, rear bumper, and the base of the antenna, with no visible license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the doors, tires, and antenna, with camouflage patterning clearly visible.
attribute_wheel_design: solid steel wheels with a simple, rugged, multi-bolt pattern and no decorative spokes
